use-cases.meta_title: How to Remove Silence from Zoom Recordings Automatically | 5cut
use-cases.meta_description: Learn how to instantly cut silence from long Zoom meeting recordings using 5cut on your iPhone and iPad. No cloud upload required.
use-cases.h1: Remove Silence from Zoom Recordings Automatically
use-cases.tagline: Turn a 2-hour Zoom meeting into a concise 45-minute summary.
use-cases.paragraph_1: Zoom meetings are notorious for long pauses, dead air while sharing screens, and awkward silences. 5cut allows you to import your Zoom MP4 recordings and automatically strip out the silence on your iPhone or iPad. Because all processing happens locally, your confidential meeting data never leaves your device.

faqs.q: How do I import a Zoom recording into 5cut?
faqs.a: Save your Zoom MP4 file to your iPhone or iPad (via AirDrop, iCloud, or Files app) and share it to the 5cut app, or open 5cut and import it directly.

faqs.q: Is my Zoom meeting data uploaded to the cloud?
faqs.a: No. 5cut processes all video and audio locally on your device, ensuring complete privacy for sensitive business or educational meetings.

use-cases.meta_title: Remove Silence from OBS Streams & Recordings | 5cut
use-cases.meta_description: Edit your OBS Studio VODs faster. Automatically cut silence from your MKV/MP4 recordings on your iPhone or iPad.
use-cases.tagline: Edit your Twitch VODs and OBS streams in minutes, not hours.
use-cases.paragraph_1: Streamers and content creators often end up with hours of OBS Studio footage filled with dead air. 5cut analyzes your OBS MP4 recordings and automatically cuts the silent segments right on your iPhone or iPad, allowing you to quickly export a high-energy, action-packed video ready for YouTube or TikTok.

faqs.a: Yes, 5cut fully supports MP4 recordings exported from OBS Studio. If you record in MKV, simply remux to MP4 within OBS before transferring to your iPhone or iPad.

faqs.q: Will silence removal desync my game audio?
faqs.a: No, 5cut trims the entire video and audio timeline simultaneously, ensuring perfect lip-sync and game audio synchronization.

alternatives.meta_title: The Best Free Mobile TimeBolt Alternative for iOS | 5cut
alternatives.meta_description: Looking for a mobile TimeBolt alternative? 5cut offers automatic silence removal, on-device transcription, and speaker identification for free on iPhone and iPad.
alternatives.tagline: Remove silence automatically from your iPhone or iPad.
alternatives.paragraph_1: TimeBolt is a great desktop tool for PC and Mac users. However, if you are looking for an alternative that lets you edit video directly from your iPhone or iPad, 5cut is your best choice. 5cut processes your video entirely on-device for maximum privacy and speed without relying on desktop hardware. Plus, it includes built-in transcription and speaker identification.

faqs.a: While TimeBolt focuses on desktop users, 5cut provides a highly optimized, native experience specifically built for iPhone and iPad users. It includes advanced features like speaker identification and 30-language transcription natively on iOS.
Yes, 5cut is free to use with up to 10 exports per month, making it a highly accessible mobile alternative to premium desktop tools.
